areaLabel: Forward Camp East Road and Bridgehead Slice
notes: Eighth real slice extends east from chapter-07 into a bridge approach and a bridgehead supply post. It intentionally reuses the current guard gate, shop, chest, and battle patterns so the main new system pressure is cross-chapter portal stitching plus chapter-local reference pack maintenance. / 第八段真实切片从 chapter-07 继续向东扩展到桥头前路与桥头补给哨所。它刻意复用现有的守兵门禁、商店、宝箱和战斗模式，因此新增系统压力主要集中在跨章 portal 拼接和章节级 reference pack 维护。
title: Bridgehead Post Advance
